prompt:
Subject: A summer fireworks festival with a night sky filled with fireworks and a goldfish-patterned yukata / fireworks festival portrait

Person/Expression: Young Japanese woman, natural hair and makeup, an up-do hairstyle suitable for a summer festival with loose black hair, thin loose strands around the face, a blue flower hair ornament, translucent skin, elegant makeup with prominent red lips, a calm and confident expression, natural eye contact with the camera.

Clothing/Pose: A summer yukata with large light-blue circles and red goldfish patterns on a white background, a deep pink obi belt. The sleeves are naturally separated from the shoulders and body, with a structure that clearly shows the sleeve openings and overlapping fabric. One hand is stretched out towards the camera, holding out a fan with the same white background, light-blue circles, and red goldfish pattern.

Background/Lighting: A fireworks display along a river at night, a riverbank crowded with spectators, colorful fireworks reflections on the water surface, large bursts of red, blue, purple, and gold fireworks, with a large golden weeping willow firework on the right. A festive, vibrant, and heated summer festival atmosphere.

Composition/Camera: Vertical composition, low angle, powerful perspective with a wide-angle lens. A strong foreground expression with the fan thrust toward the camera like a lipstick advertisement. The fan and hand appear large, with the person's face and yukata positioned in the background. A cinematic composition with fireworks filling the background, shallow depth of field, and high-definition focus showing both the hand and face naturally.

Texture/Style: High definition, 4K quality, realistic skin texture showing pores and fine lines naturally, texture showing the weave of the yukata fabric and details of the goldfish pattern, texture of the Japanese paper fibers and bamboo ribs of the fan, realistic lighting with fireworks light reflecting on the skin and yukata, vibrant and high-contrast summer festival photography, powerful and realistic AI portrait expression like a magazine advertisement.

Negative: Low quality, unnatural face, unnatural hands, extra fingers, missing fingers, distorted fingers, strange eye contact, asymmetrical eyes, collapsed face, distorted body, yukata sleeves and body fused together, unnatural cuffs, broken clothes, distorted obi, deformed fan, excessive processing, excessive skin correction, overexposure, unnatural texture characteristic of AI, text, logos, watermarks.
